member.name: T:Cloudy.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Cloudy.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Cloudy.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Cloudy.My.Resources.Resources.Blue_circle
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: P:Cloudy.My.Resources.Resources.Cloud
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: P:Cloudy.My.Resources.Resources.Copy
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: P:Cloudy.My.Resources.Resources.Delete
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: P:Cloudy.My.Resources.Resources.Folder
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: P:Cloudy.My.Resources.Resources.Left_Arrow
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: P:Cloudy.My.Resources.Resources.More
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: P:Cloudy.My.Resources.Resources.Paste
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: P:Cloudy.My.Resources.Resources.Refresh
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.
